feedback.text: I would like to see this act expanded to include more rights around videogames. I speak from experience when several years ago my ability to access The Crew videogame was disabled. This is 60 lost just like that. Of course the game publisher had The Crew 2 sequel ready to be sold for 60. We have so few rights in this area. Imagine your 2020 car gets completely disabled for no other reason than manufactures need you to buy the 2025 edition. Its insane.
